From SRB2 Wiki
This article or section contains a spoiler, an unlockable, or a secret. Please leave the page if you do not wish to view spoilers.
To do
1. Insert thumbnails for the levels if possible.

2. Confirm all the composers/arrangers' name.

This is a list of music included in SRB2. There are 112 music tracks in total. Most tracks are present in both Ogg and MIDI format, although some are only included in Ogg format.

Format

Internally, SRB2 identifies each music track with a unique name consisting of up to six characters. This name is used when specifying a music track, for example with the Music attribute in level headers and cutscenes, or with the tunes console command. Music tracks are stored as lumps in music.dta, until 2.2.14. The lump name for a track consists of its name, preceded by an O_ prefix for Ogg and other digital formats, and a D_ for the MIDI version. For example, the lump names for GFZ1 are O_GFZ1 and D_GFZ1.

See Sound and music tutorial > Music for an explanation of how to add custom music to SRB2.

List of music tracks

Single Player levels

Name Thumbnail Title Composers/Arrangers Uses/Notes
TUTORL Tutorial clairebun, Arrow
  • MAPZ0 – Tutorial Zone
GFZ1 Greenflower Zone Act 1 clairebun, Shane Strife, DrTapeworm, DemonTomatoDave
  • MAP01 – Greenflower Zone Act 1
  • MAP03 – Greenflower Zone Act 3 (Post-boss)
GFZ2 Greenflower Zone Act 2 clairebun, DemonTomatoDave
  • MAP02 – Greenflower Zone Act 2
VSBOSS VS Dr. Eggman clairebun, Shane Strife, SeventhSentinel Note: This is the music used for all regular boss fights.
  • MAP03 – Greenflower Zone Act 3 (Boss fight)
  • MAP06 – Techno Hill Zone Act 3 (Boss fight)
  • MAP09 – Deep Sea Zone Act 3 (Boss fight)
  • MAP12 – Castle Eggman Zone Act 3 (Boss fight)
VSALT Mystic Realm – Boss clairebun, RedXVI Note: This track is used for boss levels in Mystic Realm.

  • MAP07 – Deep Sea Zone Act 1
  • MAP09 – Deep Sea Zone Act 3 (Post-boss)
DSZ2 Deep Sea Zone Act 2 clairebun, Shane Strife, Arrow

CEZ1 Castle Eggman Zone Act 1 clairebun, DrTapeworm, Arrow
  • MAP10 – Castle Eggman Zone Act 1
  • MAP32 – Forest Fortress Zone
  • MAPF7 – Dual Fortress Zone
CEZPRE Castle Eggman Zone Act 1 – Anticipation clairebun Note: This track does not have a MIDI version.
  • MAP10 – Castle Eggman Zone Act 1 (Pre-bridge)
CEZR The Bridge Is Collapsing! clairebun, Arrow
  • MAP10 – Castle Eggman Zone Act 1 (Bridge section)
CEZ2 Castle Eggman Zone Act 2 clairebun, DrTapeworm, Arrow
  • MAP11 – Castle Eggman Zone Act 2
  • MAP12 – Castle Eggman Zone Act 3 (Post-boss)
  • MAPM3 – Thunder Citadel Zone
ACZ1 Arid Canyon Zone Act 1 clairebun, Shane Strife, Nev3r, Spazzo

ACZ2 Arid Canyon Zone Act 2 clairebun, Shane Strife, DrTapeworm, Nev3r

VSFANG VS Fang the Sniper clairebun, Yayoi Wachi Note: This track is based on the Fang theme from Sonic Triple Trouble.
  • MAP15 – Arid Canyon Zone Act 3
RVZ1 Red Volcano Zone Act 1 DrTapeworm, Arrow
  • MAP16 – Red Volcano Zone Act 1
  • MAPF9 – Blazing Precipice Zone
RVZ2 Red Volcano Zone Act 2 DrTapeworm, clairebun, Arrow Note: This track is planned to be used for Red Volcano Zone Act 2, which is not yet included in SRB2. The thumbnail used is of Infernal Cavern Zone, which can be considered the latest representative map for this track.
  • MAPM5 (Pre-v2.2.14) – Infernal Cavern Zone
RVZALT Red Volcano Zone (Alternate) clairebun, Arrow Note: This track is a remix of the original Red Volcano Zone Act 2 theme. This track does not have a MIDI version.
DCZ Dark City Zone Arrow, SSNTails

Note: This track was originally created for Dark City Zone, which is not yet included in SRB2. While it is now planned to make a new track for Dark City Zone, this track is still included as an additional music choice for custom maps. The thumbnail used is of Starlit Warehouse Zone, which can be considered the latest representative map for this track.

  • MAPN0 – Starlit Warehouse Zone

  • MAP22 – Egg Rock Zone Act 1
ERZ2 Egg Rock Zone Act 2 clairebun, Shane Strife, Big Wave Dave
  • MAP23 – Egg Rock Zone Act 2
  • MAPF4 – Twisted Terminal Zone
DISCO Earthworm Jim 3D – Disco Zombies Ged Grimes,
MIDI version by Monster Iestyn

BCZ1 Race Against Metal Sonic DrTapeworm
  • MAP25 – Black Core Zone Act 1

  • MAP26 – Black Core Zone Act 2 (Post-boss)
VSBRAK VS Black Eggman clairebun, Shane Strife, Arrow
  • MAP27 – Black Core Zone Act 3

Note: This track originates from Sonic: Emerald Quest, where it was known as "Tails' House". It incorporates elements of Sunset Park Zone's music from Sonic Triple Trouble.

MP_FIR Mystic Realm – Flame Rift Zone clairebun, RedXVI Note: This track is used for Flame Rift Zone in Mystic Realm.

  • MAPG0 – Metal Star Zone

MP_WT2 Mystic Realm – Sunken Plant Zone clairebun, RedXVI

Note: This track is used for Sunken Plant Zone in Mystic Realm.

Special tunes

Name Thumbnail Title Composers/Arrangers Uses/Notes
_STJR STJr intro clairebun
  • Sonic Team Jr. intro
OINTRO Introduction (Old) DemonTomatoDave, Remastered by SSNTails

Note: This track was used for the intro cutscene in SRB2 TGF.

_INTRO Introduction RedXVI, SSNTails
  • Intro cutscene
_ENDB Ending (Bad) DrTapeworm *Ending (6 or less Chaos Emeralds)
_ENDG Ending (Good) DrTapeworm *Ending (All 7 Chaos Emeralds)
_CREDS Credits clairebun
  • Credits
_TITLE Title Screen clairebun
  • Title screen
_CHSEL Character Select clairebun
  • Character select screen
_RECAT Record Attack clairebun
  • Record Attack menu
_NITAT NiGHTS Mode clairebun, Arrow
  • NiGHTS Mode menu
_INTER Multiplayer Intermission clairebun, Masato Nakamura

Note: This track is based on the multiplayer results music from Sonic 2.

  • Multiplayer intermission
_INV Invincible clairebun, Arrow
  • Invincibility
_MINV Starman clairebun, Koji Kondo Note: This is a remix of the Starman theme from Super Mario Bros..
  • Invincibility (Mario mode)
_SHOES Super Sneakers clairebun
  • Super Sneakers
_1UP 1-Up clairebun, SSNTails
  • Extra life
_SUPER Super Sonic clairebun, SSNTails
  • Super Sonic
_DROWN Drowning clairebun, Yukifumi Makino Note: This is a remix of the drowning theme from official Sonic games.
  • Drowning countdown
  • Race timer countdown
  • Special Stage timer countdown
_NTIME Dream over... Naofumi Hataya Note: This is the "time up" jingle from NiGHTS into Dreams. This track does not have a MIDI version.
  • NiGHTS timer countdown
_CLEAR Act Clear clairebun, SSNTails
  • Single Player/Coop score tally
CHPASS Special Stage Pass clairebun Note: This track was originally created for Chaos Mode.
  • Special Stage score tally (Passed)
CHFAIL Special Stage Fail clairebun Note: This track was originally created for Chaos Mode.
  • Special Stage score tally (Failed)
_GOVER Game Over clairebun
  • Game over screen
_CONTI Continue clairebun
  • Continue screen
_PINCH Pinch clairebun Note: This track is used as the pinch theme in SRB2 Battle.
_OVRTM Overtime clairebun Note: This track is used as the overtime theme in SRB2 Battle.
